pr_text:
## Title: Fix NULL pointer dereference before allocation check in rr_dl_setup

### Summary
Reorder the NULL check and pointer dereference in `rr_dl_setup()` to prevent segmentation faults and restore proper error handling. The original code dereferenced the malloc result before validating it, causing two critical issues: (1) if allocation fails, the code crashes on `*(int *) data = 0` before reaching the AssertFatal, and (2) the AssertFatal becomes dead code that never catches allocation failure
